Search Content:
export async function digitizeWithBackend(
  file: File,
  opts?: {
    realWidthCm?: number;
    realHeightCm?: number;
    furnitureType?: string;
  }
): Promise<DigitizeResult> {
  const form = new FormData();
  form.append('file', file);
  if (opts?.realWidthCm) form.append('real_width_cm', String(opts.realWidthCm));
  if (opts?.realHeightCm) form.append('real_height_cm', String(opts.realHeightCm));
  if (opts?.furnitureType) form.append('furniture_type', String(opts.furnitureType));

  // Upload to Node.js backend on its direct port (avoids Vite proxy multipart issues)
  const base = import.meta.env.VITE_NODE_API_URL || import.meta.env.VITE_BRAIN_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5001';
  const res = await fetch(`${base}/api/upload`, { method: 'POST', body: form });

 57 | /**
 58 |  * Upload a file to the Node.js proxy (which forwards to Python engine).
 59 |  * Returns detected features and DXF download link.
 60 |  */
 61 | export async function digitizeWithBackend(
 62 |   file: File,
 63 |   opts?: {
 64 |     realWidthCm?: number;
 65 |     realHeightCm?: number;
 66 |     furnitureType?: string;
 67 |   }
 68 | ): Promise<DigitizeResult> {
 69 |   const form = new FormData();
 70 |   form.append('file', file);
 71 |   if (opts?.realWidthCm) form.append('real_width_cm', String(opts.realWidthCm));
 72 |   if (opts?.realHeightCm) form.append('real_height_cm', String(opts.realHeightCm));
 73 |   if (opts?.furnitureType) form.append('furniture_type', String(opts.furnitureType));
 74 | 
 75 |   // Use relative path so Vite dev proxy handles forwarding (bypasses Windows proxy)
 76 |   // Upload to Node.js backend on its direct port (avoids Vite proxy multipart issues)
 77 |   const base = import.meta.env.VITE_NODE_API_URL || import.meta.env.VITE_BRAIN_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5001';
 78 |   const res = await fetch(`${base}/api/upload`, { method: 'POST', body: form });
 79 | 
 80 |   if (!res.ok) {
 81 |     const err = await res.text();
 82 |     throw new Error(`CAD engine failed (${res.status}): ${err}`);
 83 |   }
 84 | 
 85 |   return res.json();
 86 | }

 88 | /**

 91 | export function getDownloadUrl(result: DigitizeResult): string {
 92 |   const base = import.meta.env.VITE_CAD_ENGINE_URL || '';
 93 |   // result.download looks like "/api/download/<filename>", change to use proxy
 94 |   const pyPath = result.download.replace('/api/', '/py-api/');
 95 |   return base ? `${base}${result.download}` : `${window.location.origin}${pyPath}`;
 96 | }

101 | export function downloadDxf(result: DigitizeResult): void {

103 |   const a = document.createElement('a');
104 |   a.href = url;
